details: Use a normal Synapse username/password account, not only Google login if the package requires token authentication.

task: Open AACR GENIE BPC Public project
details: Navigate to the GENIE Biopharma Collaborative Public Synapse project.
For NSCLC v2.0-public, accept the data use terms on Synapse.
Create a PAT in Synapse settings. Store it safely. Do not paste it in public notebooks.

task: Download or pull NSCLC v2.0-public data
details: Use Synapse web download, synapseclient Python, or R genieBPC package.

task: Extract clinical, genomic, treatment, and outcome tables
details: Needed tables include patient, sample, mutation, regimen/drug exposure, imaging/medical oncology assessments, progression, death/follow-up.
